hooks.command: f=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$/i.test(p)){console.log(p)}})"); [ -n "$f" ] && bunx biome check --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; true

f=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/i.test(p)){console.log(p)}})"); [ -n "$f" ] && bun run typecheck || true
